name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Erased
body:
#
Since our campaign started fifty-one weeks ago, we've been through a lot together, sisters and brothers - to say the least. As we've gone toe-to-toe with the political establishment, Wall Street, super PACs, and the billionaire class, I want to remind you of something.
The media likes to portray this as a fair fight on even footing. They seem to forget that when we started our campaign on April 30, we barely registered in the polls. We didn't have a political organization, we didn't have millionaires waiting in the wings. Quite frankly, we didn't have a whole lot. And then millions of people came together in a political revolution.
The latest national poll average shows us just 1.4 percent behind Secretary Clinton. **We've erased a 55-point advantage she once held over our campaign. That is really quite something.**
[**Can Bernie count on you to make a $2.70 contribution to our campaign today to help us win, and as a way of saying YOU WILL NEVER STOP FIGHTING for the values we share?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-declaration-of-support?refcode=em160422-s1-scoop "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-declaration-of-support?refcode=em160422-s1-scoop")
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-declaration-of-support?refcode=em160422-s1-scoop "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-declaration-of-support?refcode=em160422-s1-scoop")
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-declaration-of-support?refcode=em160422-s1-scoop "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-declaration-of-support?refcode=em160422-s1-scoop")**
The graph you see above of our national polling average is something nobody ever thought possible. More and more Americans hear about Bernie Sanders, and they like what they hear. Let's keep working hard for our political revolution.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Friend, a Congressman said this today about Donna:
_" It is whether the people of Maryland want somebody who can be effective, **or somebody who 's going to bask in her own feelings of moral superiority because of various and sundry factors, and effectiveness has nothing to do with it."**

-Rep. Gerry Connolly_
Let's be clear.
Donna has fought off corporate developers and won, founded the National Network to End Domestic Violence, lead the fight to pass the Violence Against Women Act, taken on the NRA to get guns out of the hands of domestic abusers, and passed legislation to provide after school suppers to thousands of Maryland children -- **and yet, here is a Congressman reducing her accomplishments to zero.**
**[This is absurd, and shows why we need Donna's voice in the halls of power more than ever. Please rush a contribution now so we can send Donna to the U.S. Senate and win this primary in 3 days.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffa3/767134fb/5c4d3fb6/43380854/478062621/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDIyUE0tTkQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160422PM-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

So despite what they say or how much they attack -- she won't back down.

---
Friend --

When Katie McGinty called the scientists at the Franken Center for Innovation in Fundraising Emails (FCIFE), they patched the call through to me right away (they know I'm a big fan of Katie's).

I thought about giving her the fundraising email that secretly knows whether you root for the Steelers or the Eagles, but that's still a bit buggy. And our fundraising email that shovels your driveway is still being tested back in Minnesota.

So I told her the truth: she doesn't need help from the scientists at the FCIFE, she just needs you to know how critical this race is. So in case you somehow missed it: this race is important. _Very important_.

[**Katie 's race is going to be a close contest that could determine control of the U.S. Senate. Chip in $5 now to make sure we don't miss this opportunity to send a true progressive champion to Washington.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6944142826850484224/25918787601563648?refcode=e20160423.2&refcode2=e20160423.2nd&amount=25)

Look, I'm sending this email because I know Katie will be a great senator who I will be able to count on to take on the tough challenges and vote the right way. She will be a fighter for our Democratic values. And I also know that if we're hoping to take back the majority in the Senate, we've got to win in Pennsylvania.

[**Katie 's on our side and we need to be on hers. Contribute $5 now to put Katie on the path to victory.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6944142826850484224/25918787601563648?refcode=e20160423.2&refcode2=e20160423.2nd&amount=25)

Thanks for helping me help Katie.

Al

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Cup of Joe: April 23, 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak
body:
www.JoeSestak.com
pril 23rd, 2016
Newsletter
"DAYS LEFT" EDITION

Good morning! With just days left until the primary election, I need you now more than ever. Check out what I've been up to, and please chip in what you can!

Poll: Sestak leads McGinty by 6 as race tightens

WASHINGTON -- A second poll in as many days showed a dramatically tightening contest in Pennsylvania's Democratic U.S. Senate primary, with Joe Sestak holding a narrow lead over Katie McGinty, according to a Franklin & Marshall poll released Thursday.

The survey found Sestak up 33-27 just days ahead of the April 26 primary. In March the same poll found Sestak leading McGinty by 17 percentage points -- but that was before McGinty allies poured more than $4 million into promoting her and attacking the front-runner.

Read more at http://www.philly.com/philly/blogs/capitolinq/Poll-Sestak-leads-McGinty-by-6-as-race-tightens.html#c0ypWHJ877K8wrBb.99

6ABC: "The Former Admiral Refuses to Take His Marching Orders from Party Bosses"

Vernon Odom and 6ABC joined me this week as I met with voters in Media. Click the video below to watch 6ABC's coverage of how, even though the political establishment has lined up behind another candidate, we are still leading in the polls with the strongest message!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n5J_m3jqgqM

Reject the Special Interests

$4.5 million in outside Democratic money is being wasted trying to defeat us in the primary - instead of being used to defeat Republicans like Pat Toomey and Donald Trump. Join me in rejecting the special interests ... please watch the ad below and contribute $5, $10, $15, $20, or $25 to beat back the outside money and put people first!

JoeSestak.com/contribute

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U0BiMeyilNI

Stopping by Temple University to Talk, Listen, and Teach

I was honored to be invited by the Phi Beta Omega chapter of Alpha Kappa Alpha to discuss integrity of service.

On my way out of the meeting at Temple Ambler, I was asked to step in to help teach a class ... how could I not? It was great to be back in the classroom teaching again!

Sign, Sign, Everywhere a Sign!

We are down to our last hundred yard signs at headquarters as they have gone fast all across Pennsylvania! Please remember to take your yard sign with you on Election Day to your polling location -- then grab it as polls close to use in November!

GET READY TO VOTE ON TUESDAY, APRIL 26TH!

Thanks for reading -- and please click the "contribute" button to keep our momentum going.

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: State of the race
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
One of the reasons Bernie has done so well throughout this campaign is because he is telling the truth about the reality of American life today. And right now, I want to tell you the truth about the reality of this race:
You already know that the New York primary was a tough loss. But there are five more primaries in less than one week and we are going fight for every single vote and every single delegate.
**Not just because we are going to do everything we can to win, but because every single vote, and every single delegate for Bernie Sanders is a declaration of support for the values we share.**
Together, we are the most powerful force for change in American politics today. Our political revolution has already forced a former U.S. Senator and Secretary of State to change her mind on matters as critical as international trade, the Keystone Pipeline, and the federal minimum wage. And with every vote and every victory, we grow stronger. That's why I have to ask:
[**Can Bernie count on you to make a $2.70 contribution to our campaign today to help us win, and as a way of saying YOU WILL NEVER STOP FIGHTING for the values we share?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-declaration-of-support?refcode=em160423-v2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/a-declaration-of-support?refcode=em160423-v2-full")
_The New York Times_ reported that just this week the Clinton campaign "hosted hundreds of bundlers" at a Manhattan hotel to "focus on bolstering her fund-raising for the contest against Mr. Sanders." Her millionaire and billionaire backers are still fighting, because for them our campaign is about more than an election -- our success threatens their way of life. That's why the head of Goldman Sachs said Bernie is "dangerous."
He is right. We are dangerous for Wall Street and the billionaire class of this country. And with every contribution, every vote, and every delegate, we become even more powerful. That's why your contribution matters.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

name: Rob's iPhone
subject: On my way to Toledo
body:
| Peter --

We just kicked off our second Super Saturday with an impressive crowd in Brecksville and now I’m in the car on the way to Toledo.

For our second Super Saturday, we have a goal of contacting more than 50,000 voters in a single day! Since May 1st of last year, our fantastic interns and volunteers have contacted more than 1.6 million targeted voters -- and we’re just getting started!

In this election Ohio voters have a clear choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for higher wages and more jobs, or a return to Ted Strickland’s failed policies of higher taxes, burdensome regulations, and bigger government. Jane and I are crisscrossing the state to help contact voters and meet with our incredible volunteers and interns. It’s not too late to join us, you can RSVP [here](http://www.robportman.com/super_saturday_april?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril4&n=1). Thanks for your support! All best, Rob

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Fighting for the Soul of the Democratic Party
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719836/3476a20e/d911ffe/27427478/3457438105/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, I became a member of the Democratic Party because, after I retired from the military to take care of my daughter in her fight against cancer, I wanted to work on health care reform so that everyone would have access to the same level of care that saved my daughter's life. In Congress, I fought for Obamacare, but I also fought to protect workers' right to organize, to increase the minimum wage, to protect our environment and clean air and water, to protect a woman's right to choose, and for true equality for LGBT Americans. **In the Senate, I want to continue that fight, because even though I am independent of party power, I remain devoted to my party 's principles of equal opportunity, protecting those who cannot protect themselves, and the rule of law over ****rule****of men.** That's why this morning, I went on MSNBC to explain how I will continue fighting for the soul of the Democratic Party, even if I must do so independently of the establishment. [Please watch my interview below, and please contribute today to send back to Congress a fighter for principle above party!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719836/3476a20e/d911ffe/27427467/3457438105/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jsmsnbc?refcode=16EM04231FBp1")

body:
|

>
> Hi friend, thank you so much for helping our campaign fund our final media buy before Primary Day. In 3 days voters go to the polls and I wanted to talk about exactly what's at stake this Tuesday.
>
> I joined this campaign over a year ago because I believed Chris is the leader Maryland needs at this critical time. I believe that more than ever today, but I know he can't do it alone. Despite all the polls and articles, in the end this election will be decided by the people who come out to vote on Tuesday. **[Can you help out by making a donation to help our election day Get Out The Vote efforts right now?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d34/70cdc2ba/47e7d15e/396c720/2644356291/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/superpacfinalstretch_cvh?refcode=em42316&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+help+out+by+making+a+donation+to&utm_campaign=em42316&source=em42316")**
>

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: On Tuesday:
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When we first launched our campaign, the political media dismissed us. They said our "radical ideas" would never attract much support against an "inevitable candidate."
But together, we've built a campaign that has shocked the political establishment.
Maryland's primary takes place on Tuesday, and the stakes couldn't be any higher. **So we are asking you directly: please commit to vote to move this country in a very different direction.**
**[Commit to Vote»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/commit-to-vote-MD?source=em160423 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/commit-to-vote-MD?source=em160423")** [**Commit to vote in Maryland on April 26 »**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/commit-to-vote-MD?source=em160423 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/commit-to-vote-MD?source=em160423")
Nothing about our campaign is radical. The American people want to raise the minimum wage, make public college tuition-free, expand Social Security, and address climate change.
We simply need the courage to reject the status quo and take on the greed of the billionaire class, which is why **we all must participate in the democratic process.**
On Tuesday, April 26, you will have the chance to stand up and be heard. [**Let our campaign know that you are committed to voting on April 26 in Maryland.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/commit-to-vote-MD?source=em160423 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/commit-to-vote-MD?source=em160423")
I thank you for everything you've shared with me and all the support you've given our campaign. Now it's time to bring it home on Tuesday.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Why a moratorium? Johns Hopkins: fracking may harm pregnant women
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719849/3476a20e/d91a236/27424ae6/836165579/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, There is a lot at stake in this election, including clean water and people's health. Just recently, researchers at the _Johns Hopkins Health Review_ discovered that living near a Marcellus shale fracking well may increase pregnant women's risk of giving birth prematurely: | "Environmental epidemiologist Brian Schwartz analyzed birth _data from nearly 11,000 babies in 40 counties in Pennsylvania._ He and fellow researchers compared that data with data on nearby fracking wells--there are more than 8,000 in the state. Living in the most active drilling regions was associated with a 40 percent increase in the likelihood of a pre-term birth and a 30 percent increase in the chance that the pregnancy was designated high-risk." \- Johns Hopkins Health Review, Spring/Summer 2016 edition
---

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719849/3476a20e/d91a236/27424ae5/836165579/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM04232FBb1")
---
**Peter, I have been a longtime, consistent supporter of a moratorium on Marcellus shale fracking - until we can prove we can get it right. The EPA is forbidden from examining what they are putting into the ground, and we know that lead is used by frackers.**
Despite this and other studies, **my primary****opponent unfortunately****continues to support hydraulic fracking as Pennsylvania's "secret sauce," and her campaign is partially funded by executives in the fracking industry.**

[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719849/3476a20e/d91a236/27424ae4/836165579/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM04232FBb2")
---

**In fact, in****Congress****I introduced legislation to close the Halliburton Loophole that allows fracking companies to keep secret the chemicals used in fracking fluid.**
_**So when my opponent talks about fracking as Pennsylvania 's "secret sauce," it reinforces why I am running: to be a leader who is accountable to people above anything else.**_
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719849/3476a20e/d91a236/27424ae3/836165579/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM04232FBb3")
---
[There is a lot at stake in this election, Peter. Please pitch in today to ensure that your next Senator is looking out for you, not special interests, and not the fracking industry.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719849/3476a20e/d91a236/27424ae2/836165579/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM04232FBp1")
Warmly,
Joe
P.S. Tomorrow, the final debate of the election will be aired on Philadelphia's 6ABC at 11 AM. We have confirmed that the debate will be made available to watch live on [6ABC's](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719849/3476a20e/d91a236/27424ae1/836165579/VEsA/ "http://6abc.com/") homepage at 6abc.com via either the Live Video feed on their website, or via a red button which will appear on the homepage at 11 AM. Please tune in!
